Name: Xiranflow
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's ATK <@ba.vup>+10.0%</>.
Whenever the wearer <#ba.consume>consumes</> <#ba.conduct>Electrification</> or <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>, the wearer gains a number of buff stacks equal to the <#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</> of the Arts Reaction consumed, with each buff stack giving <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG Dealt</> and <@ba.natur>Nature DMG Dealt</> <@ba.vup>+15.0%</> for 25s. The number of buff stacks maxes out at 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.
